heading: Administrative cost
label: 1982 Administrative cost
text: Except as provided in sections 1920(c), 1923(d), and 1955(c) of this title, the United States shall bear the cost of administration in connection with this chapter, including expenses for medical examinations, inspections when necessary, printing and binding, and for such other expenditures as are necessary in the discretion of the Secretary.
notes: CodificationAmendment by is based on section 107(4) of H.R. 2099, One Hundred Fourth Congress, as passed by the House of Representatives on , which was enacted into law by .Pub. L. 104–99Pub. L. 104–99Dec. 7, 1995

Amendments1996— substituted “Except as provided in sections 1920(c), 1923(d), and 1955(c) of this title, the United States” for “The United States”.Pub. L. 104–991991— renumbered as this section and substituted “Secretary” for “Administrator”.Pub. L. 102–83section 782 of this title
